data.content:
[2026-03-21T09:03:43.720212Z] unknown: # Implementation Plan: Font Size + Contrast Improvements for Conversation Log

## Problem
The Conversation Log section and all its sub-components use very small font sizes (9–13px) and low-contrast text colors (slate-400, slate-500 against dark backgrounds like #05070f and #0b1020), making the content difficult to read.

## Strategy
Two systematic changes across two files:

### 1. Font Size Bump (one step larger everywhere)
| Current        | New            | Where Used                                       |
|----------------|----------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| `text-[9px]`   | `text-[10px]`  | Dropdown sub-labels in InteractionPicker          |
| `text-[10px]`  | `text-[11px]`  | Entry headers, raw event details, filter labels   |
| `text-[11px]`  | `text-[12px]`  | Main content text, badges, session metadata, conversation selector, toolbar text |
| `text-[13px]`  | `text-[14px]`  | "Conversation Log" title                          |

### 2. Contrast Improvements
| Current         | New             | Context                                          |
|-----------------|-----------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| `text-slate-500`| `text-slate-400`| Filter section headings, empty states, status     |
| `text-slate-400`| `text-slate-300`| Timestamps, secondary labels, session IDs         |
| `text-slate-300`| `text-slate-200`| Agent labels, "Conversation" label, response headers, badges |
| `text-sky-200`  | `text-sky-100`  | Prompt entry headers (already light, small bump)  |
| `text-slate-600`| `text-slate-500`| Pipe separators in toolbar                        |
| Backgrounds with heavy transparency (e.g. `bg-slate-900/60`, `bg-sky-950/35`) | Increase opacity (e.g. `bg-slate-900/80`, `bg-sky-950/50`) | Entry card backgrounds for stronger contrast      |

### 3. Icon Size Bump
| Current    | New        | Where Used                            |
|------------|------------|---------------------------------------|
| `size-3`   | `size-3.5` | Small inline icons (Clock3, Bug, etc) |
| `size-3.5` | `size-4`   | Entry header icons (Bot, MessageSquareText, TerminalSquare) |

## Files Changed
1. **`src/components/agent-history-view.tsx`** — Main conversation log container, session cards, entry rows, session start/end markers, raw event details
2. **`src/components/interaction-picker.tsx`** — Interaction picker toolbar, filter dropdowns, filter option rows

## Scope Boundaries
- Only touches the Conversation Log section (lines ~280–1197 in agent-history-view.tsx) and the InteractionPicker component
- Does NOT change the beat list panel, detail panel, or other sections of agent-history-view
- Does NOT change layout, spacing, or functional behavior — purely visual (font size + color)

## Test Strategy
- Visual inspection in the browser by loading a beat with conversation history
- Verify no Tailwind class conflicts or typos via `bun run lint` and `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- No unit tests needed — pure styling change

## Risk Assessment
- **Low risk**: All changes are Tailwind class string replacements
- **No behavioral changes**: Only visual presentation affected
- **Easy to verify**: Side-by-side comparison with current UI
- **Easy to revert**: Single commit with class-only changes

## Complexity
Low — systematic find-and-replace of Tailwind classes within well-understood components.

ReTake: Some fonts are still really small with terrible aliasing and contrast.  with a dark background we need the fonts to pop a bit more.
ReTake: Why don't we try matching the font size/color scheme to what we use for the UI Terminal launched by Take?  The anti-aliasing and contrast is really good in that component.
